story.beat: Dusk over a windswept clifftop village that has feared the mountain for a hundred years. Elder Mara begs our hero, Illinois Jim, to end the curse before the last seal breaks, pointing him toward the trailhead.
narration: They called it Halward's Reach. A village clinging to the edge of the world.
For a century, they'd lived in the shadow of the mountain's curse.
Now, with the last seal weakening, they needed a hero. They got me.

art.prompt: A vast, dramatic dusk sky in a 16-bit pixel art style. The clouds are streaks of blood red, tarnished gold, and deep obsidian purple, with a low, pale teal moon rising. SNES/Genesis aesthetic.

Distant, jagged mountains silhouetted in obsidian against a dark teal sea, under a dusky sky. The scene is painted in a 16-bit pixel art style with a limited, moody palette. The sea has glints of tarnished gold from the setting sun.
Sheer, dark obsidian cliffs in the mid-ground, detailed with pixel-art rock textures and clinging patches of parchment-colored moss. 16-bit SNES/Genesis style, dramatic lighting from a low sun.
A seamless, horizontally tileable strip of weathered cobblestone street. 16-bit pixel art, with obsidian, grey, and parchment tones. The stones are uneven and cracked.
A seamless, horizontally tileable strip of a rugged dirt path at a cliff's edge. 16-bit pixel art, earthy parchment and obsidian tones. Small rocks and roots are visible.

A rustic, timber-frame village house with a steep, pitched roof made of teal-colored slate tiles. The walls are weathered parchment-colored plaster. 16-bit pixel art style. Single object on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.

A small, sturdy stone village house with a tarnished gold thatched roof. A single window glows with warm light. 16-bit pixel art style, heavy obsidian outlines. Single object on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A wooden market stall with a tattered blood-red canvas awning. Crates and barrels are visible underneath. 16-bit SNES/Genesis pixel art. Single object on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A long clothesline with parchment-white and teal sheets flapping in the wind. 16-bit pixel art style. Rendered as a single sprite on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
Elder Mara, an old woman with a shawl of blood red and obsidian, her face lined with worry. She leans on a gnarled staff. 16-bit character sprite on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A stoic village watchman in a tarnished gold helm and teal tunic, holding a pike. 16-bit character sprite on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A grizzled ferryman with a thick beard, holding a long oar. He wears a heavy obsidian coat. 16-bit character sprite on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A menacing, stylized crow with obsidian feathers and glowing blood-red eyes. Its wings are slightly spread. 16-bit enemy sprite on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A heavy, ancient-looking iron portcullis, decorated with tarnished gold filigree. It is blocking a stone archway. 16-bit pixel art object on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A large, rustic iron lever set in a carved stone base. The lever is in the 'off' position. 16-bit pixel art style. Single object on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A single, large, tarnished gold coin, embossed with a strange, ancient seal. It glints brightly. 16-bit pixel art pickup sprite on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A beautiful pendant, a teal gemstone set in an ornate tarnished gold housing. It glows faintly. 16-bit pixel art secret item sprite on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A simple, breakable clay pot of parchment color with a blood red stripe. 16-bit pixel art object on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.
A small, stone shrine with a single flickering teal flame inside. 16-bit pixel art style on a flat solid magenta (#FF00FF) background.

secrets.hint: A high rooftop near the trailhead seems to lead nowhere, but a leap of faith might reveal a hidden alcove.
